name: Priya Menon
bio: 8+ years in Bengaluru homes—deep cleans, kitchen focus, and eco-friendly supplies on request. Punctual and pet-friendly.

name: Arjun Kapoor
bio: Former hotel housekeeping—fast turnovers for flats and villas. Great for same-week visits and festival prep.

name: Kavitha Nair
bio: Kitchens and baths are my forte—tiles, sinks, and fixtures brought back to shine. Clear communication every visit.

name: Fatima Sheikh
bio: Cleaning plus light organising—ideal before guests, after travel, or when the whole flat needs a reset.

name: Rohan Sharma
bio: Recurring weekly or bi-weekly plans across Mumbai. Reliable for laundry, dusting, and full-home upkeep.

name: Ananya Iyer
bio: Short-stay and PG turnover—linens, restocking, and photo-ready rooms between guests. Same-day slots when open.
